headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Franklin Resources, Raises Price Target to $34
summary: Barclays  analyst Benjamin Budish   maintains Franklin Resources (NYSE:BEN) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $31 to $34.
